headline: Is Comfort Systems Riding on the AI Infrastructure Growth Wave?
summary: Comfort Systems USA rides on the AI-driven data center boom, with surging revenues, a record backlog and rising margins signaling strong growth momentum.

headline: Captiva Verde Welcomes Josh F.W. Cook to the Advisory Board
summary: Jacksonville, Florida--(Newsfile Corp. - March 30, 2026) - Captiva Verde Corp. (CSE: PWR) (OTC Pink: CPIVF) (the "Company or Captiva") announces the appointment of Josh F.W. Cook to the Advisory Board.Josh F.W. Cook is a seasoned government executive and communications consultant with over 30 years of experience solving complex political and natural resource conflicts in California, Arizona, and Nevada. Josh most recently served as EPA Administrator for Region 9, where he led efforts across...

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Quanta Services, Raises Price Target to $580
summary: Mizuho  analyst Maheep Mandloi   maintains Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $537 to $580.
